steps.title: Write the nitrogen amount
steps.content: Each kilogram contains $500$ milligrams of nitrogen. For $x$ kilograms, the nitrogen amount is $500x$ milligrams.

steps.title: Set it equal to the total
steps.content:
The sample contains $1{,}500$ milligrams total, so the equation is:
$$500x=1{,}500$$
The answer is D.
